---
title: "Research & Notes"
description: "Technical notes and code on VAR models, time-series econometrics, and applied macroeconomics by Andrés Martínez Glez."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  feed: true
---

Technical notes, replications, and code. Source for everything here is on [GitHub](https://github.com/AndresMtnezGlez); older versions of some notes remain on [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/andresmtnezglez).
